Spirit of Wolf  

Description

2: Increase Movement by 30% (L9) to 85% (L51)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 40 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 4.5 Recast Time: 3.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You feel the spirit of wolf enter you.
Cast on other: Soandso is surrounded by a brief lupine aura.
Effect Fades: The spirit of wolf leaves you.

Game Description

Infuses your target with the spirit of the wolf, increasing their movement speed for 27.0 mins @L9 to 36.0 mins @L12.

Items with this effect

  • 10 Dose Blood of the Wolf
  • 5 Dose Blood of the Wolf
  • Adventurer's Wand
  • Ascendant Adventurer's Wand
  • Blood of the Wolf
  • Blood Orchid Katana
  • Bone Studded Boots
  • Cloak of the Fleeting Foot
  • Grand Adventurer's Wand
  • Mighty Adventurer's Band
  • Nature Walker's Boots
  • Orchid Bloom Katana
  • Philter of the Wolf I
  • Philter of the Wolf II
  • Philter of the Wolf III
  • Philter of the Wolf IV
  • Philter of the Wolf V
  • Prominent Adventurer's Wand
  • Red Velvet Ice Skates
  • Rowyl's Boots of Nature
  • Sandals of Harmony
  • Spell: Spirit of Wolf
  • Supreme Adventurer's Band
  • Watchman Boots
  • Wolf Fang Necklace
  • Woven Grass Boots

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Spirit of Wolf
ClassLevel
SHM9
BST24
RNG28
DRU10
Expansion:

Duration:
27.0 mins @L9 to 36.0 mins @L12
  • Comments (19)
  • Sold By (24)
  • NPCs with Ability (47)
  • Screenshots
Add Image

Merchants:


Abysmal Sea
  • Adnia Pashdi - 1gp 4sp 9cp
  • Dadein Shadowbow - 1gp 4sp 9cp

Cabilis East
  • Vessel Grott - 1gp 8sp 3cp

Crescent Reach
  • Amilan - 1pp 3gp 6sp 4cp
  • Menzra - 1pp 3gp 6sp 4cp

East Freeport
  • Ardrian Zhusius - 1pp 3gp 6sp 4cp
  • Firrion Roweus - 1pp 3gp 6sp 4cp

Greater Faydark
  • Cerila Windrider - 1pp 3gp 6sp 4cp
  • Horth Evergreen - 1pp 3gp 6sp 4cp

Grobb
  • Hoart - 1pp 3gp 6sp 4cp

Halas
  • Tukanta - 1gp 4sp 9cp

Neriak Commons
  • Draven S`Koril - 1gp 4sp 9cp

Oggok
  • Hoart - 1pp 3gp 6sp 4cp

Rivervale
  • Torth Largefoot - 1pp 3gp 6sp 4cp

Shadow Haven
  • Jales Gaelshorad - 1gp 6sp 5cp

Shar Vahl
  • Scribe Lar - Luclin - 1gp 4sp 9cp
  • Vaelar - 1gp 4sp 9cp

Surefall Glade
  • Arrivae Valleren - 1pp 3gp 6sp 4cp

The Mines of Gloomingdeep
  • Celrak - 1pp 6gp 5sp 4cp
  • Rowyl - 1pp 6gp 5sp 4cp

The Plane of Knowledge
  • Mystic Abomin - 1gp 4sp 9cp
  • Pathfinder Vaered - 1gp 4sp 9cp
  • Primalist Saosith - 1gp 4sp 9cp
  • Wanderer Astobin - 1gp 4sp 9cp
  • a batling spiritchanneler
  • a druid
  • a dryad
  • a fanatical convert
  • a festering rat
  • a froglok nokta shaman
  • a highland kobold shaman
  • a marsh creeper
  • a preserver of Hiz
  • a spinereef seahorse
  • a Spiroc Harvester
  • a sporali harvester
  • a sporali replenisher - Corathus Creep
  • a Stone Hive gardener
  • a thifling orator
  • a thifling sprite
  • a wandering spirit
  • a wavering Deathfist
  • an Apprentice Herbalist
  • Bile Spew
  • Bunu Stoutheart
  • Chef Vuzcv
  • Chief Groplin
  • Fleshrot
  • Gargh
  • Groo McManus
  • Gurrin Nitestorm
  • Jerg Oakenfist
  • Jhaya Wyndrunner
  • Krode the Diviner
  • Lerian Wyndrunner
  • Narra Tanith
  • Niera Farbreeze
  • Ran Walker
  • Severilous
  • Sifaye defender
  • Soothsayer Dregzak - Frontier Mountains
  • Soothsayer Mrugg Doxok
  • The Fabled Estrella of Gloomwater
  • The Spiroc Lord
  • Thistle Underbrush
  • Tibrinn Ember
  • Trug

# Mar 19 2011 at 2:40 PM Rating: Decent

Scholar
16 posts
Can buy in Plane of Knowledge: Mystic Ryrin.

QuoteReply
# May 22 2007 at 9:02 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593971875479
View User Forum
458 posts
My ranger tops it out at level 40 last I checked. He might have max'd it sooner. I wasn't really paying attention.

*edit* I lied, he's at 50% at level 40... It might top out at 50, ya never know.

Edited, May 23rd 2007 1:05am by basicxp
▲ Page top
The *correct* run speed.
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2006 at 8:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591811630399
14 posts
Rope Bridle (Horse) or Small Drum (Drogmor): +7%
- Horses are sold in Bazaar (Luclin) Drogmors are sold in Gunthak (LoY)
- 8,400pp / 9,540pp (Quest returns Bag of Platinum Pieces - 6,476pp sellback)

Selo's Rhythm of Speed: +10% (fixed {before percussion modifier} usable indoors)
- 25th lvl Bard song. Purchased with Adventures Points, LDoN expansion
- Various drums should modify the bonus from +18%, normal drum, to +34%, War Drums of the Rathe

Innate Run Speed (AA Ability) RS1: +10%, RS2: +20%, RS3: +30% (fixed)
- 51st lvl required, one AA point per level, Shadows of Luclin expansion
- This is a permanent increase to your base movement speed, indoors or out

Spirit of the Shrew: +30% (fixed, usable indoors)
- Purchased with Adventure Points, LDoN expansion
- Single/group versions -- SHM 29/34 - DRU 34/39 - BST 39/44 - RNG 44/49
- Feral Pack (group) DRU 52 and Feral Form (self) RNG 64 combine this spell with wolf form, LDoN expansion

Journeyman's Boots (rclick effect): +35% (fixed)
- Quested, nodrop (droppable on FV server) Original Everquest (no expansions needed)
- Jboots are clickable from inventory and are instant so you can cast while moving

Traveler's Boots (rclick effect): +35% (fixed)
- 5,250pp, nodrop (presumably droppable on FV server) Original Everquest (no expansions needed)
- Sold by a NPC vendor in the gnome mining town in Solusek's Eye (SolA) dungeon located in Lavastorm
- Faction required unless you have racial/class Sneak ability or faction modifying spells
- Clickable from inventory but NOT instant like jboots. Cast time is 1.5 seconds

Grease Injection (rclick effect): +40% (fixed)
- Only available to Gnomes via tinkered armor
- Available to Gnome plate classes at 20th lvl on Clockwork Watchman Greaves
- Available to Gnome rogues at 45th lvl on Clockwork Shadowwalker Leggings

Swift Journey (AA ability): SJ1: +40%, SJ2 50% (fixed)
- 61st lvl required, Innate Run Speed 3 required. Gates of Discord expansion
- 5 AA points for SJ1, 10 AA points for SJ2. SJ2 may have higher level requirement

Leather Bridle (Horse) or Drum (Drogmor): +43%
- Horses are sold in Bazaar (Luclin) Drogmors are sold in Gunthak (LoY)
- 27,300pp / 31,500pp (Quest returns Heavy Bag of Platinum Pieces - 21,047pp sellback)

Illusion Scaled Wolf: +45%
- 44th lvl Enchanter spell, nodrop, purchased in PoK library. Planes of Power expansion
- This spell is self only barring the AA ability Project Illusion (62nd lvl PoP AA)

Spirit of Wolf: +55%
- Single/group versions -- SHM 9/na, DRU 14/39(Pack Spirit), BST 30/na, RNG 30/na
- 34% (L9) to 55% (L50)
- Shaman made Blood of the Wolf potions have this effect
- 39th lvl SHM spell Spirit of Bih'Li is the same speed as Spirit of Wolf but adds an ATK bonus

Wolf Form (self only): +55%
- DRU 24, RNG 49
- 42% (L24) to 55% (L50)

Spirit of Eagle: +60%
- DRU 54, RNG 65
- 57% (L54) to 60% (L60)

Share Wolf Form: +60%
- DRU 39
- 49% (L39) to 60% (L60)

Greater Wolf Form (self only): +60%
- DRU 34, RNG 56
- 52% (L34) to 60% (L60)

Form of the Great Wolf (self only): +60%
- DRU 44
- 57% (L44) to 60% (L60)

Share Form of the Great Wolf: +62%
- DRU 49
- 59% (L49) to 62% (L54)

Flight of Eagles: +65% (fixed)
- DRU 62

Form of the Howler (self only): +67%
- DRU 54
- 62% (L54) to 67% (L65)

Scale of Wolf (fragile*): +70%
- Single/group versions -- SHM 24/52, DRU 29/53
- 57% (L24) to 70% (L50)
- *Fragile means the buff will drop if you attack (or riposte an attack on you) or if you cast a spell
- This spell is seldom used because of the fragile restriction

Form of the Hunter (self only): +72%
- DRU 60
- 70% (L60) to 72% (L65)

Silken Bridle (Horse) or Large Drum (Drogmor): +78%
- Horses are sold in Bazaar (Luclin) Drogmors are sold in Gunthak (LoY)
- 60,900pp / 65,100pp (Quest returns Big Bag of Platinum Pieces - 46,952pp sellback)

Chain Bridle (Horse) or Giant Drum (Drogmor): +114%
- Horses are sold in Bazaar (Luclin) Drogmors are sold in Gunthak (LoY)
- 95,550pp / 103,950pp (Quest returns Huge Bag of Platinum Pieces - 73,666pp sellback)

Spirit of cheetah (self only): +115%
- DRU 24, SHM 24
- 99% (L24) to 115% (L40)
- This spell lets you sprint for 48 seconds but takes 10 minutes to refresh

Holy Steed/Unholy Steed (AA ability): +150%
- 59th level required, 5 AA points, Shadows of Luclin expansion
- 6 AA spent in General (L51) and 12 AA spent in Archetype (L55) required
- Paladin/Shadowknight Summoned Horse. Paladin horse is white, Shadowknight horse is black
- This effect instant and the mount can be summoned while moving

Ornate Chain Bridle (Emperor/Seru Horse): +150%
- Emperor drops White, Seru drops Black, nodrop, Shadows of Luclin expansion

Selo's Accelerando : +156% (capped)
- Bard song -- 20% (L5) to 65% (L50) WITHOUT A DRUM (or other percussion modifying item)
- Various drums improve the bonus by a multiple of 1.8 to 3.4 up to the 156% cap

Citing: http://www.rpgexpert.com/1462.html
▲ Page top
The *correct* run speed.
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2007 at 7:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591923873379
Scholar
319 posts
I didn't see Glowing Drum listed here. I believe it is the same speed as the Seru and Emperor horses, and is quested with lots of plat and time in the Casino, which is in Shadow Haven, Shadows of Luclin expansion. Please correct me if I am wrong.

I also don't see Philter of the Wolf I - V listed here. Does anyone know the resulting run speeds from these? I speculate that even though all give the effect of SOW, the run speed may vary, just as the various horse run speeds vary, but all have the effect of "summon horse".

There are new bridles available as a result of the LON card game. I haven't seen any documentation of the speed of the mounts, but I read speculation that it would be the same as the Emp/Seru/Glowing mounts.

Please note that on multiple tries over the last month of so, I have been unable to load any of the RPG Expert pages I have cliked on, either from my favorites list, or links within articles. Previous to that for months the pages had been defaced by spammers/vandals of various types. I suspect the RPG Expert web site may be down forever. I am glad you copied this very fine list and posted it here for reference, which would otherwise be lost.

▲ Page top
Level restriction
QuoteReply
# Nov 27 2005 at 8:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781754598
22 posts
Hi, Just wondering, does the enhanced run speed relate to the level of the caster or the receiver?
▲ Page top
RE: Level restriction
QuoteReply
# May 31 2006 at 8:38 AM Rating: Decent
Shadriel
View User Forum
Scholar
200 posts
caster... if caster is say level 20, then you will be running alot slower than if the caster were level 70, same principle for any of the clicky items... altho with the recent changes to alchemy, and the sow potions, you may be able to get high level run speed off the higher versions of the potions, and will probably be stuck with slower runspeed if you have the lower version of the potion. It is most likely based on the potion itselfs quality level, and not the players level. I have noticed this to be true with other potions, such as the ones for increasing int/wis or your mana pool, the level one potion does very little, but a higher quality version does quite a bit.
____________________________
Shadriel Valshara'Slyan - DE Cleric (EQ)
Shyntrai the Noble - BE Hunter (WoW - retired)

available from Scartok in nek foreign quarter

▲ Page top
RS5 > Bih'Li
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2004 at 2:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592262669386
Scholar
145 posts
runpeed 5 appears to be faster than Bih'Li cast by a 65 shaman.

I'm a 65 rogue with runspeed 5, and was Bih'Li'ed by a 65 shaman. I was in NDT illusion at the time, running straight forward, and clicked off of Bih'Li. I immediately surged forward slightly faster. I tried this twice, same result each time...so my conclusion is that Bih'Li was slowing me down. Illusion was held constant, and there was no bard in group.

▲ Page top
Movement Increases
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2004 at 1:03 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591789974715
Scholar
258 posts
This lists most items/abilities/spells/songs that offer changes in run speed. This information is accurate to the best of my knowledge and searches. I see the question posed often and thought I would make a comprehensive list. I didn't include items that have spell effects you can cast (ie shammie boots that cast sow). I bear no responsibility for any changes or nerfs after this post.

AAS
10% - Run 1
20% - Run 2
30% - Run 3
40% - Run 4 (Swift Journey)
50% - Run 5 (Swift Journey)

MOUNTS
25% - Horse (ghostly bridle)/(bridle of Sir Ariam)
25% - Horse (rope bridle)/Drogmor (small drum)
50% - Horse (leather bridle)/Drogmor (drum)
60% - Horse (silken bridle)/Drogmor (large drum)
70% - Horse (chain bridle)/Drogmor (giant drum)
85% - Horse (ornate chain bridle)/Drogmor (glowing drum)
95% - Holy Steed (Paladin AA horse)/Unholy Steed (Shadowknight AA horse)

ITEMS
35% - Traveler's Boots
35% - Journeyman's Boots
50% - Fabled Journeyman's Boots

SPELLS
30% - Spirit of the Shrew (Shaman 29/Druid 34/Beastlord 39/Ranger 44)
30% - Pack Shrew (Shaman 34/Druid 39/Beastlord 44/Ranger 49)
34%(lvl 9) -55%(lvl 50) - Spirit of Wolf (Shaman 9/Druid 14/Beastlord 30/Ranger 30)
49%(lvl 39)-55%(lvl 50) - Pack Spirit (Druid 39)
49%(lvl 39)-55%(lvl 50) - Spirit of Bih'Li (Shaman 39)
57%(lvl 54)-60%(lvl 60) - Spirit of Eagle (Druid 54/Ranger 65)
65% - Flight of Eagles (Druid 62)
57%(lvl 24)-70%(lvl 50) - Scale of Wolf (Shaman 24/Druid 29)
70% - Spirit of Scale (Shaman 52/Druid 53)
99%(lvl 24)-115%(lvl 40) - Spirit of Cheetah (Shaman 24/Druid 24)

ILLUSION SPELLS:SELF ONLY
40% - Feral Form (Ranger 64)
42%(lvl 44)-45%(lvl 50) - Illusion: Scaled Wolf (Enchanter 44)
42%(lvl 24)-55%(lvl 50) - Wolf Form (Druid 24/Ranger 49)
52%(lvl 34)-60%(lvl 50) - Greater Wolf Form (Druid 34/Ranger 56)
57%(lvl 44)-60%(lvl 50) - Form of the Great Wolf (Druid 44)
62%(lvl 54)-67%(lvl 65) - Form of the Howler (Druid 54)
70%(lvl 60)-72%(lvl 65) - Form of the Hunter (Druid 60)

ILLUSION SPELLS:GROUP
30% - Feral Pack (Druid 52)
49%(lvl 39)-60%(lvl 60) - Share Wolf Form (Druid 39)
59%(lvl 49)-62%(lvl 54) - Share Form of the Great Wolf (Druid 49)

SONGS (instruments not factored in)
10% - Selo's Rhythm of Speed (Bard 25)
20%(lvl 5)-65%(lvl 50) - Selo's Accelerando (Bard 5)
64%(lvl49)-65%(lvl 50) - Selo's Accelerating Chorus (Bard 49)
65% - Selo's Song of Travel - (Bard 51)

Edited, Tue Apr 20 01:54:01 2004
▲ Page top
RE: Movement Increases
QuoteReply
# Dec 15 2004 at 3:51 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592258647715
227 posts
It should be mentioned that bards get instrument and AA multipliers, so 65% for Accelerating Chorus is just their base run speed. Most bards with a decent intrument will be able to hit the max movement cap by level 50. The max movement bonus cap is 147% if I recall the number correctly.

So, yes, bards are still the fastest thing out there by a fairly long ways. Even the "bard speed" horse is left in the dust by a high level bard.

▲ Page top
RE: Movement Increases
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2004 at 5:06 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592252604174
2 posts
Know this is a bit late, but Thanks for the post Outhar. Always been curious and you laid it out so well.
